action.reasoning: Observation: DLinear test MSE 0.5051 (worse than NLinear 0.4719). Time remaining ~8 min. Analysis: NLinear original paper subtracts last input value to improve stationarity. Implementing that could boost performance. CPU training for NLinear is fast (~1.4 sec/epoch). Decision: add last-value normalization to NLinear, train 150 epochs, submit eval.
